text_original: I tried few similar apps before sticking with Fantasia, to me, this one is the best so far. Support is fast and responsive and they were able to help when I accidentally deleted my account. Few minor issues with memory but I am confident that the team will iron this issue in future updates. Thank you for your help, I appreciate it!
text_zh: 在选择 Fantasia 之前，我尝试过几款类似的应用程序，对我来说，这是目前最好的一款。客服支持非常迅速且负责，在我误删账号时提供了很大帮助。虽然在内存方面还有一些小问题，但我相信团队会在未来的更新中解决这些问题。感谢你们的帮助，非常感激！
reply_original:
Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your journey and to know we stand out among other apps. 

Regarding the memory hiccups, we actually just launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade! The AI is currently adapting to improve long-term retention.
reply_zh:
哇，读到您的消息让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您旅程中的一部分，并得知我们在众多应用中脱颖而出，这真是我们的荣幸。

关于记忆功能的小问题，我们其实刚刚发布了全新的记忆服务升级！AI 目前正在进行适应性调整，以提升长期记忆能力。
